goal: Tarjeta de destino primario Orlando en el homepage de rentatelo.com — Lake Eola al golden hour, sin personas, evocando el Orlando real más allá de los parques: lush, cálido, aspiracional.

creative_direction.core_idea: Lake Eola al golden hour — el Orlando real, más allá de los parques temáticos
creative_direction.visual_thesis: Esta imagen dice: Orlando es hermoso, lush, cálido — vale la pena el viaje aunque no vayas a Disney

composition.layout: Lake Eola fountain centered, swans on water mid-ground, subtropical oaks and royal palms framing shore left and right, Orlando skyline soft in upper background

camera.framing: 4:3 destination card — sky upper 35%, fountain and lake center 40%, shore vegetation lower 25%
camera.angle: eye-level from lakeside shore, slight elevation to capture fountain and skyline together
camera.depth_of_field: deep — fountain and swans sharp, skyline buildings slightly soft atmospheric, vegetation sharp in foreground

overlay_compatibility.zone_content: darker water surface and shadowed shore

subject.primary_feature: Lake Eola iconic tiered fountain — center frame, lit golden-amber by setting sun
subject.wildlife: 2 to 4 white swans on lake surface near fountain, natural positions
vegetation: large subtropical live oaks with Spanish moss on left shore
tall royal palms flanking right shore
tropical understory shrubs at water edge
subject.skyline: Orlando downtown skyline — Amway Center area visible but soft and receding, not dominant
subject.water: Lake Eola surface — calm mirror reflection of golden sky and fountain lit amber

scene.location: Lake Eola Park, Downtown Orlando, Orange County, Florida
scene.time_of_day: golden hour — sun 10 to 20 minutes before setting, maximum warm amber light
environment: Lake Eola circular lake with central fountain as landmark
white swans on calm water surface
subtropical live oaks with Spanish moss on western shore
royal palms and tropical vegetation framing eastern shore
Orlando modest downtown skyline in soft background
warm amber-orange sky with horizontal sunset cloud layers
scene.background_view: Orlando skyline soft and atmospheric beyond far shore — visible but not competing with fountain and vegetation; sky is warm amber-orange gradient transitioning to pale gold above
critical_scene_rules: zero people — park is completely empty
Lake Eola fountain must be center frame and recognizable — not a generic fountain
white swans on water are mandatory for character
golden hour light must feel genuinely warm and lush — no flat or cool ambient
no theme park structures, no Disney visual cues, no generic Florida beach
Orlando skyline visible but soft — not dominant over natural scene
water must be calm and mirror-like — no wind ripples destroying reflection
subtropical vegetation must feel Central Florida specific — not generic tropical

lighting.primary: golden hour warm natural light — sun low on horizon, maximum amber saturation
lighting.quality: rich warm amber cast over entire scene — lush and cinematic
lighting.fountain_lighting: warm amber-gold highlight on fountain tiers and water spray
lighting.water_lighting: mirror reflection of golden sky — horizontal amber and deep teal in depths
lighting.vegetation_lighting: warm side-lighting on oak canopy and palm fronds — rich green with amber edge highlight
lighting.skyline_lighting: soft warm ambient on distant buildings — atmospheric haze adds depth

dominant: warm amber-orange F0B576 in sky and water reflection
rich subtropical green in oak canopy
deep teal 168F8A in lake depth shadows
accent: soft pink-coral in highest cloud layers
white swan forms as contrast anchor
pale gold on fountain water spray
rules: sky must be warm amber-orange — no cool blue or grey tones
water reflection must mirror sky warmth — amber dominant with teal deep shadows
vegetation green must be rich and saturated — not yellowed or dried
overall image warmth high but not oversaturated — editorial quality not Instagram filter
skyline buildings should trend warm grey-amber — not cool blue glass

negative_prompt: theme park structures or Disney visual language
beach or ocean or coastal elements
Miami skyline or South Florida architecture
fountain absent or not recognizable as Lake Eola
master_prompt: Destination card image for rentatelo.com homepage — Orlando as the primary family destination. Show Lake Eola Park in Downtown Orlando, Orange County, Florida at golden hour — sun 10 to 20 minutes before setting. The iconic tiered Lake Eola fountain stands center-frame, lit warm amber-gold by the setting sun. Two to four white swans rest naturally on the calm lake surface near the fountain. Large subtropical live oaks with Spanish moss frame the left shore; tall royal palms flank the right. The lake surface is a near-perfect mirror of the golden sky above. The Orlando downtown skyline — Amway Center area — appears soft and atmospheric in the upper background, present but not dominant. Sky is warm amber-orange with horizontal sunset cloud layers. Wide horizontal composition 4:3, sky in upper 35%, fountain and lake center 40%, shore vegetation lower 25%. Eye-level from lakeside, 24mm natural perspective, deep focus with slight atmospheric softness on distant skyline. Color: warm amber F0B576 in sky and water reflections, deep teal 168F8A in lake depth shadows, rich subtropical green canopy, white swan forms as contrast anchors. The image must feel lush, warm, and aspirational — the Orlando beyond theme parks. Avoid: any people, theme park visual cues, beach or ocean, cold tones, Miami architecture, wind-rippled water, absent fountain, absent swans, HDR, text, watermarks, aerial perspective.
